AboutHero.Title: Crafted Luxury. Made to Last.
AboutHero.Description: Blúme Petals brings artificial flowers to life — beautifully crafted, lasting forever, made for every moment that matters.

AboutWhoWeAre.Title: Why Blúme Petals
AboutWhoWeAre.Paragraph1: Blúme Petals was born from a simple idea — that beauty shouldn't fade. We craft luxury artificial flower arrangements that capture the elegance of fresh blooms, designed to stay stunning for years, not days.
AboutWhoWeAre.Paragraph2: Based in the UAE, every bouquet we create blends premium materials with thoughtful design — whether it's one of our signature collections or a one-of-a-kind arrangement built through our Custom Bouquet Builder.
AboutWhoWeAre.Paragraph3: We believe gifting flowers should feel personal. That's why we let you choose every detail — from the shape and flowers to the ribbon and message card — so every bouquet tells your story.
AboutWhoWeAre.ImageAlt: A bouquet arrangement from Blúme Petals
